violations.text: Raw animal foods (chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (onion rings) in the two door freezer. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2025

Canned Sauce were only heated to 125 degrees Fahrenheit before being placed into hot holding. Ready to eat foods taken from a commercially processed can or intact package from a food processing plant must be heated to at least 135 degrees Fahrenheit for hot holding. Sauce was placed on stove to complete heating. Sauce was only placed in Hot hold 20 minutes prior. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2025

Desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026
The floor by the pizza oven is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2026
